scripts.dev: NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 HTTP_PROXY=${HTTP_PROXY:-$http_proxy} HTTPS_PROXY=${HTTPS_PROXY:-$https_proxy} ALL_PROXY=${ALL_PROXY:-$all_proxy} next dev
scripts.redteam:run: NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 NODE_USE_SYSTEM_CA=1 PROMPTFOO_CONFIG_DIR=.promptfoo PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_UPDATE=1 PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_SHARING=1 promptfoo redteam run -c promptfoo.redteam.yaml -o .promptfoo/redteam.generated.yaml --env-file .env.local
scripts.redteam:generate: NODE_USE_ENV_PROXY=1 NODE_USE_SYSTEM_CA=1 PROMPTFOO_CONFIG_DIR=.promptfoo PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1 PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_UPDATE=1 PROMPTFOO_DISABLE_SHARING=1 promptfoo redteam generate -c promptfoo.redteam.yaml -o .promptfoo/redteam.generated.yaml --env-file .env.local
